question: Please close UPI lite/I want to close UPI Lite
answer: You can close your UPI lite by following mentioned steps: 1. Click on UPI on Home Page 2. Click on the option 'Make Pin- Less Pauments' 3. Go to settings 4. Scroll to the Close UPI lite option and click 5. Click on Revoke

question: Why should I raise a request?
answer: You can raise a request if you are not getting a desired resolution for your query. You can raise a request with us by clicking the button below. Our representative will respond you within 48 hours. If you have already raised a request with us you can check the status by following mentioned steps: 1. Go to home page 2. Click on Menu button in right bottom corner 3. Scroll down to Help and support 4. Click on 'Click here to view all raised requests'. CTA Label: Raise a request, Android CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, IOS CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, Web CTA link: https://bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=RAR

question: Prime cashback related
answer: If the transaction is successfully done and as you are stating that you have not received the cashback, request you to raise a request with us. We request you to check the terms and conditions of the offer for eligibility and review the rewards section to see if you have already received the cashback for the transaction, if eligible, before raising a request. CTA Label: Raise a request, Android CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, IOS CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, Web CTA link: https://bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=RAR

question: I have an issue with the bill/amount displayed of the bill generated/EMI shown
answer: If there is any issue with the amount/details displayed of bill/EPI (EQUATED PERIODIC INSTALMENT (EPI)), you can contact the merchant directly. If the merchant is Bajaj, request you to select the relevant option from menu button and start the chat.

question: I want to report a fraud
answer: We take all fraud reporting very seriously and ensure prompt handling for all such cases. Request you to reset and change all your PINs and passwords immediately. No executive from Bajaj Pay will ever ask for OTP or any PIN/passwords. Request you to ensure that you do not disclose any such sensitive information to anyone. Please access the Passbook section in the App or Website, select the transaction, and click on 'Report a fraud' in the Help & Support section.

question: Can we make bill payment with EMI card
answer: Payment mode varies basis on the bill payment category selected, you can check this while making a payment. For other EMI Card related query, you can raise a chat with us by selecting EMI card option

question: Report a farud
answer: We take all fraud reporting very seriously and ensure prompt handling for all such cases. Request you to reset and change all your PINs and passwords immediately. No executive from Bajaj Pay will ever ask for OTP or any PIN/passwords. Request you to ensure that you do not disclose any such sensitive information to anyone. Please access the Passbook section in the App or Website, select the transaction, and click on 'Report a fraud' in the Help & Support section.

question: How can I view my fastag statement
answer: Please follow the below steps to download Bajaj FASTag statement: - Click on link below - Scroll down to the bottom page to check the Recent Toll Transactions and the Download statement option. - Select the date range against which the statement is required & click on Download FASTag. CTA Label: Manage FASTag, CTA Link: bajajsuperapp://bflfastag/Home

question: I want to close my FASTag

question: I want to cancel autopay
answer: A UPI mandate cannot be revoked by user if it is Loan or insurance related, for this you need to contact the biller/merchant directly. If the merchant is Bajaj, request you to click on the menu button below and select relevant option to get resolution. If bill payment related autopay, you can revoke directly by going UPI settings by clicking UPI under Homepage and then clicking on revoke Autopay post selecting the relevant Autopay.

question: What is FASTag?
answer: FASTag are prepaid rechargable tags designed to facilitate automatic payments at toll booths in India. By Affixing a FASTag on your vehicle's windscreen, you can enjoy hassle-free experience while passing through toll plazas.

question: Vehicle in Exempted List/I should not be charged for crossing fastag?
answer: We would like to inform you that the exemption is provided to The Central and State armed forces in uniform only if the vehicle is used for official purpose. In case it is used for official purpose, we request you raise a request with us with the following documents: 1. Declaration of use of vehicle for official duties; by competent authority of the concerned department. 2. Registration Certificate of the Vehicle/s for which NETC Fastag are to be issued. 3. Copy of vendor agreement in case of hired vehicles. Our representative will respond you within 48 hours.  If you have already raised a request with us you can check the status by following mentioned steps: 1. Go to home page 2. Click on Menu button in right bottom corner 3. Scroll down to Help and support 4. Click on Click here to view all raised requests. question: What is the platform fee for mobile prepaid recharge?
answer: A platform fee of Rs.3/- will be charged for any transaction from Rs.500/- to Rs.1000/- and a platform fee of Rs.5/- will be charged for any transaction of and above Rs.1000/-.

question: What is OVOT in FASTag?
answer: According to the OVOT(One Vehicle One Tag) mandate by NPCI/NHAI, each vehicle must be associated with a single, unique, active FASTag to: Prevent misuse or duplicate tagging, Ensure interoperability across toll plazas, and Maintain a centralized tag issuance record.

question: Where is Bajaj Pay sub Wallet
answer: Bajaj Pay subwallet is part of your main wallet. Sub wallet balance can be used for making bill payments.

question: What is Bajaj Sub wallet balance
answer: Your subwallet balance is <Reward_Balance>.

question: What is the maximum wallet balance allowed for Full KYC?
answer: Full KYC customers can maintain a wallet balance of up to ₹2,00,000.

question: How many Primary Load (DEF) transactions are allowed per day for Full KYC?
answer: Full KYC customers can perform up to 100 Primary Load (DEF) transactions per day.

question: What is the maximum amount allowed per Primary Load (DEF) transaction?
answer: Each Primary Load (DEF) transaction can be up to ₹2,00,000 for Full KYC customers.

question: What is the maximum number of Primary Load (DEF) transactions per month?
answer: Full KYC customers can do up to 500 Primary Load (DEF) transactions in a month.

question: What is the maximum monthly amount allowed for Primary Load (DEF)?
answer: The monthly load limit for Primary Load (DEF) is ₹4,00,000 for Full KYC customers.

question: Are there defined limits for Secondary Load (CHB) under Full KYC?
answer: The table does not specify limits for Secondary Load (CHB); please refer to platform-specific rules if needed.

question: How many InterOp P2P transactions are allowed per day for Full KYC users?
answer: Full KYC customers can do up to 20 P2P InterOp transactions per day.

question: What is the maximum amount allowed per InterOp P2P transaction?
answer: Each P2P InterOp transaction can be up to ₹50,000 for Full KYC users per day.

question: What is the monthly transaction count limit for InterOp P2P transfers?
answer: Full KYC users can perform up to 150 P2P InterOp transactions in a month.

question: What is the monthly transaction amount limit for InterOp P2P transfers?
answer: Full KYC users can transact up to ₹2,00,000 via P2P InterOp transactions in a month.

question: How many InterOp P2M transactions are allowed per day for Full KYC users?
answer: Full KYC users can do up to 20 P2M InterOp transactions per day.

question: What is the maximum amount allowed per InterOp P2M transaction?
answer: Each P2M InterOp transaction can be up to ₹50,000 for Full KYC users per day.

question: What is the monthly transaction count limit for InterOp P2M transfers?
answer: Full KYC users can do up to 150 P2M InterOp transactions in a month.

question: What is the monthly transaction amount limit for InterOp P2M transfers?
answer: Full KYC users can transact up to ₹2,00,000 via P2M InterOp transactions in a month.

question: What are the KYC requirements for BBPS services?
answer: There are no KYC requirement for making and bill payment/recharge. This will be required if you want to use wallet as a payment mode as wallet has limits defined basis KYC status but for Min KYC customers, the wallet limit will be lesser.

question: Why is my account being debited automatically?
answer: Your account gets debited automatically only if you have selected Auto Pay option for Bill Payments or Loan payments. You can check the details of Active Autopay in AutoPay option in Setting when you got to UPI option in Home Page.

question: Where can I find the terms and conditions for BBPS services?
answer: There are no t&c for BBPS payment, you can pay for the available billers via the available payment options. Charges vary based on the bill payment.

question: How can I check my due date?
answer: You can know about the next due date of any payment from the merchant (bank/biller/loan partner). If the Loan partner is Bajaj, request you to click the menu button available below and select the relevant option to get correct resolution.

question: I mistakenly purchased prime membership/subscription – how can I cancel and get a refund?
answer:
If you have purchased Prime membership, you can cancel it within 3 days of the purchase only if you have not claimed or earned any reward/coupon provided with the membership. If you have not claimed or earned any membership, you can raise a request with us by clicking the button below. Our representative will respond to you within 48 hours.

Steps to check request status:
1. Go to home page
2. Click on Menu button in right bottom corner
3. Scroll down to Help and support
4. Click on "Click here to view all raised requests"

. CTA Label: Raise a request, Android CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, IOS CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, Web CTA link: https://bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=RAR

question: MY FASTag is blocked
answer:
Your FASTag can be non-working due to reasons such as low balance, hotlisting, or any other issue. If your balance is low, ensure it’s in positive balance to keep it working. You can raise a request with us by clicking the button below. Our representative will respond to you within 48 hours.

Steps to check request status:
1. Go to home page
2. Click on Menu button in right bottom corner
3. Scroll down to Help and support
4. Click on "Click here to view all raised requests"

. CTA Label: Raise a request, Android CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, IOS CTA link: bajajsuperapp://helpsupport/raisedrequest, Web CTA link: https://bajajfinserv.in/myaccountlogin?Source=RAR
